message:
test(storage): update list_filters test with clearer test data

Rename test issues in list_filters test from generic names (bd-l1, bd-l2,
bd-l3) to more descriptive ones (bd-s1, bd-s2, bd-s3) with realistic
titles like "Fix authentication bug", "Add user registration", and
"Update documentation".

Also adjust test data to have consistent Status::Open for all issues,
making the filter tests more focused on their specific filtering criteria
(assignee, unassigned) rather than mixing status filtering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
